extensions.name: Shovel Debugger
extensions.description: Shovel's improved and feature rich debugger!

extensions.name: Server Storage
extensions.description: Similar to the server storage blocks in the 'Storage' extension, but with a better server uptime and non-global keys. Did you know the server is open source?

extensions.name: Storage Plus
extensions.description: A storage extension with many more features. Featuring server storage (with a fast server), local storage and more!

extensions.name: MotionSprite
extensions.description: An advanced math-based animation system

extensions.name: Boxed Physics
extensions.description: Implements the Box2D physics engine into PenguinMod, adding joints, springs, etc. This is different from TurboWarp's implementation.

extensions.name: Lighting
extensions.description: A fast, powerful and easy-to-use lighting engine powered by WebGL!

extensions.name: 3D Math
extensions.description: A handful of utilities for making your own sprite-based 3D engine.

extensions.name: GPU.sb3
extensions.description: Use WebGPU compute shaders to accelerate your projects. Use Pen+ for rendering, not this.

extensions.name: Beat Sync
extensions.description: An extension designed to let you sync anything in your project to a musical beat, with incredible precision.

extensions.name: Object
extensions.description: Handle large JSON files at an extreme speed.

extensions.name: Scope Variable
extensions.description: Manage your variables in a block-like structure.

extensions.name: Extra Timers
extensions.description: Allows for the creation and management of additional timer blocks.

extensions.name: Dictation
extensions.description: Convert your voice into text. (not supported in all browsers)

extensions.name: Doodle Recognition
extensions.description: A implementation of Google's Quick Draw image vision model

extensions.name: Stylus
extensions.description: Get the pressure and tilt of a stylus or graphic tablet

extensions.name: Text To Speech: Redone
extensions.description: A better alternitive to the base text to speech extension. Powered by the TTStool API

extensions.name: CloudLink
extensions.description: A powerful WebSocket extension for Scratch. Allows for online connectivity to servers for things like multiplayer.

extensions.name: E2EE
extensions.description: A general-purpose E2EE (End-to-End Encryption) extension for Scratch.

extensions.name: WebRTC
extensions.description: A barebones WebRTC implementation.

extensions.name: Spritesheeter
extensions.description: Load and manipulate spritesheets with customizable frames and XML support

extensions.name: Background Remover
extensions.description: Removes background from images.

extensions.name: PenguinHook
extensions.description: Send Webhook requests, that can be Discord or any type of webhook.

extensions.name: Number Utilities
extensions.description: Adds blocks for number formatting and manipulation.

extensions.name: Mathematics
extensions.description: Complicated maths extension for nerds.

extensions.name: Big Decimal
extensions.description: High precision operations. (Support decimals)

extensions.name: Date Format
extensions.description: Manage, format and compare dates.

extensions.name: Translation Keys
extensions.description: Use translation keys in your projects for multi-language support

extensions.name: Yet Another String Extension
extensions.description: A small collection of utilty blocks intended to make managing strings much, much easier.

extensions.name: Regular Expressions
extensions.description: Create, modify, filter, and more with the new regular expression type.

extensions.name: Sets
extensions.description: Store non-repeating, unordered data super efficiently in sets.

extensions.name: Iterators
extensions.description: Transform and iterate over different types of collections and more.

extensions.name: Algebraic Effects
extensions.description: Intercept custom actions in your scripts to pause, resume, or redirect their flow using modular handlers.

extensions.name: Blobs
extensions.description: An extension made for handling blobs which can be used to store files. Allows to easily make blobs for the Js extension

extensions.name: Random Utilities
extensions.description: Many blocks related to generating random values, including seed-based number generation, true number generation, UUID's, random strings, etc.

extensions.name: Toast Notifications
extensions.description: Did you want alerts? Notifications that are easily customizable? This is the only and best notification extension!

extensions.name: Project Interfaces
extensions.description: Effortlessly create intuitive graphical user interfaces in your projects.

extensions.name: Git Penguin
extensions.description: Make requests and control the files for your GitHub repository.

extensions.name: Pang API
extensions.description: Fetch information from the PenguinMod API.

extensions.name: TurboWeather
extensions.description: Show weather and location data for any place in our world. Data that could be used for doxxing is deleted from results.

extensions.name: Cockatiel Location
extensions.description: Fetch Users' IP Addresses and Location.

extensions.name: CORS Proxy
extensions.description: Accessible CORS Proxies for fetching information with PenguinMod.

extensions.name: Extension Exposer
extensions.description: Access the raw functions from other extensions.

extensions.name: More Fields
extensions.description: Custom Field Types

extensions.name: Beepbox Player
extensions.description: Play, edit, and read songs from any BeepBox mod directly from the URL or JSON!

extensions.name: Update File (Direct Access)
extensions.description: A simple extension that uses the File System Access API to update files dynamically.

extensions.name: YeetYourFiles
extensions.description: Upload files to the cloud by throwing it to outer space!

extensions.name: File Upload
extensions.description: Upload files to the Network, can also used with Files extension.

extensions.name: Video Sharing
extensions.description: Share your screen or camera to your projects!

extensions.name: WindowHasher
extensions.description: Interact with URL hash: the part of the URL after a hashtag

extensions.name: Scratchblocks
extensions.description: Generate blocks in the Scratch3, or Scratch2 format.

extensions.name: AuthPenguin
extensions.description: Authenticate with anything and everything!

extensions.name: Google Auth
extensions.description: Login with Google to your projects. Allows getting a name, profile picture and email from the google account.

extensions.name: Discord Auth
extensions.description: Login with discord to your projects. Identify users by ID and username in a secure and easy way!

extensions.name: Twitch
extensions.description:
Communicate with your Twitch Chat on PenguinMod!

PenguinMod is not affiliated with Twitch.

extensions.name: Chess
extensions.description: A powerful extension that lets you manage a chessboard, customize it, use Stockfish 17 (via API), a local chess engine (Lozza) and much, MUCH more!

extensions.name: CATS
extensions.description: Blocks related to cats.

extensions.name: Free Servers
extensions.description: Here you can find a free server for your projects. And also check whether it is working now or not.

extensions.name: More Types
extensions.description: Adds more value types to PenguinMod, implementing Functions, Objects, Arrays, Sets, Maps, Symbols and Nothing.

extensions.name: oneko
extensions.description: Cute cat that follows you on the block area.

extensions.name: Counter++
extensions.description: Count anything, at any time, in PenguinMod!

extensions.name: How many lines?
extensions.description: Blocks to determine the amount of new lines in a piece of text.

extensions.name: Paint Utils
extensions.description: A colour extension that lets you mix colours.

extensions.name: Resolution
extensions.description: Provides utility blocks that simplify the creation of projects with dynamic resolution support.

extensions.name: Device Motion
extensions.description: Use Device Motion API to get rotation or movement of the device. Works best on mobile devices. Thumbnail by Dillon.

extensions.name: Cryptography
extensions.description: Hash, encrypt and verify values using various algorithms. Actual security not guaranteed

extensions.name: Online Captcha
extensions.description: Protect your project with simple, easy to use captcha implementation. Fully client-side, bypass-proof captcha solution!

extensions.name: Better Storage
extensions.description: Like PenguinMod's Storage Extension, but with a couple more features, and faster servers.

extensions.name: Mouth Washer
extensions.description:
Includes many utilities related to cleaning bad words, swearing and profanity. Thought of as an extra layer of security for filtering messages.

(ft. violet and jwklong)

extensions.name: Smoke Detector
extensions.description: Plays a beep every 30 seconds.

extensions.name: Stage Brah
extensions.description: Spawn Brah cats in your codespace!

extensions.name: MIDI Controller
extensions.description: Use a MIDI keyboard to interact with projects!

extensions.name: Array Buffers
extensions.description: Read, parse, and write raw data efficiently using Array Buffers

extensions.name: Black Mold
extensions.description: mmmmm black mold
